case_title: 540 LEAVENWORTH LLC VS. SUMMER MOORE ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, SUMMER AN INDIVIDUAL HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-2018 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 540 LEAVENWORTH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, SUMMER AN INDIVIDUAL

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, SUMMER AN INDIVIDUAL HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-2018 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAR-28-2018 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SUMMER MOORE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 540 LEAVENWORTH LLC SERVED MAR-08-2018, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-28-2018 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SUMMER MOORE'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF JURY FEES & EXPENSES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 540 LEAVENWORTH LLC
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
DEMAND FOR JURY AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, SUMMER AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 540 LEAVENWORTH LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, SUMMER AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 540 LEAVENWORTH STREET, #206, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMESIS INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
